title: Beauty Editorial Closeup AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Extreme close-up beauty portrait built around adult beauty portrait subject with poised expression and refined editorial presence, soft gray-green eyes, layered pearl-and-silver ear cuffs with fine chain necklace details, soft ash-blonde hair swept into a polished low chignon with glossy flyaway edges, and glowing editorial makeup with glassy lips, pearl highlight, and soft taupe shimmer on the eyelids. Subject: adult beauty portrait subject with poised expression and refined editorial presence appears in an extreme face-and-neck close-up with soft gray-green eyes, soft ash-blonde hair swept into a polished low chignon with glossy flyaway edges, glowing editorial makeup with glassy lips, pearl highlight, and soft taupe shimmer on the eyelids, and layered pearl-and-silver ear cuffs with fine chain necklace details as the visible beauty and accessory focus. Scene: Deep charcoal studio background kept minimal so the face, neck, hair edges, and jewelry reflections remain the entire visual focus. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Extreme face-and-neck crop, blue or cool-toned eyes, delicate silver jewelry, sleek low bun or chignon, dewy gloss makeup, champagne shimmer, charcoal background, and dramatic rim light. Style: High-fashion beauty editorial photography with ultra-sharp jewelry detail, lifelike skin texture, refined glossy makeup, and polished magazine cover finish. Color Palette: Fixed deep charcoal background, silver jewelry highlights, cool eye tones from soft gray-green eyes, champagne shimmer, clear gloss reflections, and neutral skin tones. Lighting: Strong dramatic rim lighting against the charcoal background with crisp highlights on jewelry, lips, hair edges, cheekbones, and neck contours. Camera: Macro beauty portrait crop with shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes, lips, jewelry reflections, and individual hair edges. Materials: Silver jewelry, glossed lips, shimmering eyeshadow, high-shine hair, skin texture, and reflective metal details remain crisp. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
